citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:00 PM on
05/05/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the registrant by calling on the phone and knocking on the door with no
answer. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:

A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:00 PM on 
05/05/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the registrant by calling on the phone and knocking on the door with no 
answer. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and 
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
